title: System intent satisfaction: structured answers
scope: Governing intent: Prefer compact queryable state, declared config, and normalized operational mirrors over prose-first operation whenever one structured answer is enough.
goal: Assess whether routine orientation now routes through compact structured outputs.
non_goals: Do not audit every CLI command output size.
Do not replace all prose docs with structured records.

review_mode.review question: Are the main startup and durable-intent paths structured and compact enough to avoid prose-first operation?
review_mode.inputs inspected first: start tiny output, durable_intent report, reference docs

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace start --profile tiny --task "Make a review each on the satisfaction of the main system intents" --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section durable_intent --format json; rg compact/queryable/defaults/report references
review_method.evidence sources: startup context payload; durable_intent compact report; docs/reference/startup-context.md; .agentic-workspace/docs/compact-contract-profile.md

findings.title: Satisfaction is high for first-contact routing
findings.summary: The default path provided compact structured startup, durable intent, delegation, and next-action fields without requiring raw workspace reads.
findings.evidence: start --profile tiny returned adaptive_routing, immediate_next_allowed_action, delegation_decision, skill_routing, vague_outcome_orientation, and durable_intent; durable_intent report gave a compact contract answer with decision tests and references.
findings.risk if unchanged: The remaining risk is unevenness in less-used command profiles, not the main startup path assessed here.
findings.suggested action: Keep command ergonomics evaluation focused on secondary surfaces rather than reopening first-contact routing.
findings.promotion trigger: Only promote if a future command-ergonomics loop finds a routine path still returning broad prose-first output by default.

recommendation.dismiss: No new first-contact structured-answer work is indicated.

retention.trigger: superseded by a newer CLI ergonomics review
retention.proof surface: startup-context schema/reference docs and compact command outputs

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace start --profile tiny --task "Make a review each on the satisfaction of the main system intents" --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section durable_intent --format json
drift_log: 2026-05-08: Review created and filled from durable-intent doctrine pass.
